name: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM - Check Cashing USA (Miami)
description_short: Miami's CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM - Check Cashing USA at 8518 SW 40th St delivers fast Bitcoin transactions and check cashing in Southwest Miami.
description_long:
CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM - Check Cashing USA operates at 8518 SW 40th St in Miami, FL, housed within Check Cashing USA. This Southwest Miami location serves the community Monday through Saturday from 9AM to 6PM, providing convenient access for Bitcoin and financial transactions.

At this Miami location, customers can quickly purchase and sell Bitcoin using the CoinFlip ATM interface, plus access full check cashing services. Call +1 773-800-0106 to confirm service availability or ask about current Bitcoin pricing at this Miami, FL branch.

If you're a Miami resident looking for immediate Bitcoin access or need to cash a check near SW 40th St, bring your valid ID and visit during business hours. CoinFlip offers straightforward cryptocurrency and check cashing services for Florida customers seeking reliable financial access.
pros: Extended operating hours (9 AM–6 PM weekdays/Saturday) providing consistent access vs. traditional banking hours
Supports up to $15,000 daily transaction limits for CoinFlip Account holders, enabling larger purchases
24/7 customer support via phone (1-877-757-2646) and email for transaction assistance and troubleshooting
Integrated crypto wallet app allows account management and transaction history tracking across multiple visits
Multiple cryptocurrency options beyond Bitcoin, providing diversification within a single ATM interface
Convenient co-location with Check Cashing USA and other retail services in accessible Miami neighborhoods
No bank account requirement—cash-only transactions eliminate barriers for unbanked customers
cons: Specific fee structure is not disclosed on the website, leaving customers unable to compare costs or budget transactions
Closed on Sundays with limited availability on weekdays, reducing accessibility compared to 24/7 ATMs
Daily transaction limits may be restrictive for investors seeking larger cryptocurrency purchases
No price protection or volatility warnings provided; customers face full market exposure at time of purchase
Requires prior crypto wallet setup via app download, creating friction for first-time users unfamiliar with digital wallets
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers seeking cash-to-crypto conversion without traditional bank accounts
Cryptocurrency enthusiasts in Miami making regular Bitcoin or altcoin purchases under $15,000
Customers already visiting Check Cashing USA or nearby retail locations who want convenient crypto access
Users comfortable with cryptocurrency markets seeking quick cash-based entry without exchange accounts
diagnosis: CoinFlip's Miami Bitcoin ATM is best suited for cash-holding consumers who want immediate cryptocurrency access without banking relationships, or experienced crypto users making regular purchases under location limits. The primary caveat is the complete lack of transparent fee disclosure, making cost comparison impossible before transaction—customers must call support or visit in-person to understand actual pricing, which defeats the convenience proposition of self-service ATMs.
services: Alternative cryptocurrency purchase (coins not specified on site)
Cryptocurrency sale for cash at select locations
CoinFlip Account creation for transaction history and increased daily limits
CoinFlip Crypto Wallet app download and management
24/7 customer support via phone and email
Multi-location transaction management via CoinFlip Account
Real-time cryptocurrency pricing and conversion at ATM interface
Transaction processing with KYC/AML compliance (implied by account requirements)
